title: D.E.E.P
description: Cloud-native evolution of HARBOR — fully serverless, multi-cloud eDNA taxonomy inference platform with Hugging Face, AWS Lambda, SQS, and Cloudflare.
overview: DEEP is the fully cloud-native evolution of the HARBOR eDNA taxonomy inference system. While HARBOR ran as a local pipeline, DEEP re-architects the platform for global availability, auto-scaling, and zero-ops maintenance. Hugging Face hosts ML inference, AWS provides serverless compute and CDN, and Cloudflare ties everything with custom domain and DNS.

features.label: Serverless Inference Backend
features.description: Models deployed on Hugging Face Inference Endpoints with auto-scaling.

features.label: Global UI Delivery via CDN
features.description: React dashboard served globally through AWS CloudFront.

features.label: API Gateway + Lambda
features.description: Routing, auth, validation handled by AWS Lambda behind API Gateway.

features.label: Asynchronous Job Queuing
features.description: SQS-based batch classification for large FASTA files.

features.label: Custom Domain & DNS
features.description: Cloudflare domain mapping with DDoS protection.

features.label: Open-Set Taxonomy (Core HARBOR)
features.description: Preserves alignment-free feature engineering, CNN embeddings, FAISS, novelty detection.

algorithms.name: Deterministic Feature Engineering
algorithms.description: Sliding-window k-mer encoding in Lambda pre-processing.

algorithms.name: Marker-Specific CNN Embeddings
algorithms.description: Served via Hugging Face, per-marker dedicated models.

algorithms.name: FAISS ANN Retrieval
algorithms.description: Pre-built indices in S3, loaded for similarity search.

algorithms.name: Statistical Novelty Detection
algorithms.description: Distance/density gates in Lambda orchestration for known vs novel.

modules.name: Hugging Face Inference Backend
modules.responsibility: Hosts embedding models, returns normalized vectors

modules.name: Lambda Consumer (Worker)
modules.responsibility: Job processing, FASTA splitting, HF calls, result aggregation

results: Auto-scaling handles isolated queries and batch jobs
Global CDN delivers sub-2-second UI loads worldwide
Core scientific performance matches HARBOR v1
